results.name: shell:false — language injection blocked, bash features work within code
Sandbox can write to temp files (intentional design — process isolation not filesystem isolation)

results.name: Background subprocess spawned from sandbox
results.actual: child PID 40476 may survive parent kill
results.notes: KNOWN LIMITATION: spawned detached children not in process group. Fix: use process group kill in sandbox.

results.name: Controlled subprocess spawning (50 background children) — parent exits cleanly
results.expected: parent returns quickly after spawning children
results.notes: Process tree kill (taskkill /T) handles remaining children on Windows
